---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement or new capability
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: cskolny
---

## Summary
A one-sentence description of the feature you'd like.

## Problem this solves
Describe the limitation or friction you're running into today. What can't you do, or what's harder than it should be?

## Proposed solution
Describe what you'd like to happen. Be as specific as you can — UI changes, new behavior, new file format support, etc.

## Alternatives considered
Have you tried any workarounds? Are there other ways this could be solved?

## Utility / use case context
- Utility (if relevant): RG&E / NYSEG / CMP / UI / CNG / SCG / Berkshire Gas / Other
- Service type (if relevant): Electric / Gas / Both
- File format (if relevant): CSV / XML / Other

## Additional context
Any other context, mockups, links, or examples that would help explain the request.
